_comment: Auto-repair fixture: stage 8 (pre-commit hook rejects) failure at attempt 1. Stage 8 runs `git commit` on the client repo; a husky pre-commit hook can reject on lint/format/typecheck issues the workflow's preflight missed. fix-task.ts stage8Commit greps the log tail for husky-flavoured error lines and calls emitTrpJFailure with stage_label 'TRP7 pre-commit hook' and the extracted line as the FAILING_CMD suffix.

emit_env.FAILING_CMD: git commit (husky): error Command "prettier" not found.
